KEINEMOD-OLD_SCROLL.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Time Shift[/gold] [blue]{TimeShiftPower}[/blue], [gold]Create[/gold] a [gold]Scroll of Valor[/gold].
KEINEMOD-OLD_SCROLL.title: Old Scroll
KEINEMOD-ENCHANTED_SCROLL.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Time Shift[/gold] [blue]{TimeShiftPower}[/blue], choose an [gold]Upgraded Sacred Scroll[/gold] to [gold]Create[/gold] and gain [blue]{SacredPower}[/blue] of its [gold]Sacred Power[/gold].
KEINEMOD-ENCHANTED_SCROLL.title: Enchanted Scroll

KEINEMOD-POCKET_WATCH.description: [gold]Time Shift[/gold] needed to gain [gold]Full Moon[/gold] is lowered to [blue]10[/blue]. You may enter [green]Hakutaku[/green] form any number of times each turn.
KEINEMOD-POCKET_WATCH.title: Pocket Watch
